시편 119:1.content: Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to Yahweh’s law.

시편 119:2.content: Blessed are those who keep his statutes, who seek him with their whole heart.

시편 119:3.content: Yes, they do nothing wrong. They walk in his ways.

시편 119:4.content: You have commanded your precepts, that we should fully obey them.

시편 119:5.content: Oh that my ways were steadfast to obey your statutes!

시편 119:6.content: Then I wouldn’t be disappointed, when I consider all of your commandments.

시편 119:7.content: I will give thanks to you with uprightness of heart, when I learn your righteous judgments.

시편 119:8.content: I will observe your statutes. Don’t utterly forsake me.

시편 119:9.content: How can a young man keep his way pure? By living according to your word.

시편 119:10.content: With my whole heart, I have sought you. Don’t let me wander from your commandments.

시편 119:11.content: I have hidden your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.

시편 119:12.content: Blessed are you, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:13.content: With my lips, I have declared all the ordinances of your mouth.

시편 119:14.content: I have rejoiced in the way of your testimonies, as much as in all riches.

시편 119:15.content: I will meditate on your precepts, and consider your ways.

시편 119:16.content: I will delight myself in your statutes. I will not forget your word.

시편 119:17.content: Do good to your servant. I will live and I will obey your word.

시편 119:18.content: Open my eyes, that I may see wondrous things out of your law.

시편 119:19.content: I am a stranger on the earth. Don’t hide your commandments from me.

시편 119:20.content: My soul is consumed with longing for your ordinances at all times.

시편 119:21.content: You have rebuked the proud who are cursed, who wander from your commandments.

시편 119:22.content: Take reproach and contempt away from me, for I have kept your statutes.

시편 119:23.content: Though princes sit and slander me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.

시편 119:24.content: Indeed your statutes are my delight, and my counselors.

시편 119:25.content: My soul is laid low in the dust. Revive me according to your word!

시편 119:26.content: I declared my ways, and you answered me. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:27.content: Let me understand the teaching of your precepts! Then I will meditate on your wondrous works.

시편 119:28.content: My soul is weary with sorrow: strengthen me according to your word.

시편 119:29.content: Keep me from the way of deceit. Grant me your law graciously!

시편 119:30.content: I have chosen the way of truth. I have set your ordinances before me.

시편 119:31.content: I cling to your statutes, Yahweh. Don’t let me be disappointed.

시편 119:32.content: I run in the path of your commandments, for you have set my heart free.

시편 119:33.content: Teach me, Yahweh, the way of your statutes. I will keep them to the end.

시편 119:34.content: Give me understanding, and I will keep your law. Yes, I will obey it with my whole heart.

시편 119:35.content: Direct me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in them.

시편 119:36.content: Turn my heart toward your statutes, not toward selfish gain.

시편 119:37.content: Turn my eyes away from looking at worthless things. Revive me in your ways.

시편 119:38.content: Fulfill your promise to your servant, that you may be feared.

시편 119:39.content: Take away my disgrace that I dread, for your ordinances are good.

시편 119:40.content: Behold, I long for your precepts! Revive me in your righteousness.

시편 119:41.content: Let your loving kindness also come to me, Yahweh, your salvation, according to your word.

시편 119:42.content: So I will have an answer for him who reproaches me, for I trust in your word.

시편 119:43.content: Don’t snatch the word of truth out of my mouth, for I put my hope in your ordinances.

시편 119:44.content: So I will obey your law continually, forever and ever.

시편 119:45.content: I will walk in liberty, for I have sought your precepts.

시편 119:46.content: I will also speak of your statutes before kings, and will not be disappointed.

시편 119:47.content: I will delight myself in your commandments, because I love them.

시편 119:48.content: I reach out my hands for your commandments, which I love. I will meditate on your statutes.

시편 119:49.content: Remember your word to your servant, because you gave me hope.

시편 119:50.content: This is my comfort in my affliction, for your word has revived me.

시편 119:51.content: The arrogant mock me excessively, but I don’t swerve from your law.

시편 119:52.content: I remember your ordinances of old, Yahweh, and have comforted myself.

시편 119:53.content: Indignation has taken hold on me, because of the wicked who forsake your law.

시편 119:54.content: Your statutes have been my songs in the house where I live.

시편 119:55.content: I have remembered your name, Yahweh, in the night, and I obey your law.

시편 119:56.content: This is my way, that I keep your precepts.

시편 119:57.content: Yahweh is my portion. I promised to obey your words.

시편 119:58.content: I sought your favor with my whole heart. Be merciful to me according to your word.

시편 119:59.content: I considered my ways, and turned my steps to your statutes.

시편 119:60.content: I will hurry, and not delay, to obey your commandments.

시편 119:61.content: The ropes of the wicked bind me, but I won’t forget your law.

시편 119:62.content: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to you, because of your righteous ordinances.

시편 119:63.content: I am a friend of all those who fear you, of those who observe your precepts.

시편 119:64.content: The earth is full of your loving kindness, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:65.content: Do good to your servant, according to your word, Yahweh.

시편 119:66.content: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in your commandments.

시편 119:67.content: Before I was afflicted, I went astray; but now I observe your word.

시편 119:68.content: You are good, and do good. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:69.content: The proud have smeared a lie upon me. With my whole heart, I will keep your precepts.

시편 119:70.content: Their heart is as callous as the fat, but I delight in your law.

시편 119:71.content: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I may learn your statutes.

시편 119:72.content: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver.

시편 119:73.content: Your hands have made me and formed me. Give me understanding, that I may learn your commandments.

시편 119:74.content: Those who fear you will see me and be glad, because I have put my hope in your word.

시편 119:75.content: Yahweh, I know that your judgments are righteous, that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.

시편 119:76.content: Please let your loving kindness be for my comfort, according to your word to your servant.

시편 119:77.content: Let your tender mercies come to me, that I may live; for your law is my delight.

시편 119:78.content: Let the proud be disappointed, for they have overthrown me wrongfully. I will meditate on your precepts.

시편 119:79.content: Let those who fear you turn to me. They will know your statutes.

시편 119:80.content: Let my heart be blameless toward your decrees, that I may not be disappointed.

시편 119:81.content: My soul faints for your salvation. I hope in your word.

시편 119:82.content: My eyes fail for your word. I say, “When will you comfort me?”

시편 119:83.content: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke. I don’t forget your statutes.

시편 119:84.content: How many are the days of your servant? When will you execute judgment on those who persecute me?

시편 119:85.content: The proud have dug pits for me, contrary to your law.

시편 119:86.content: All of your commandments are faithful. They persecute me wrongfully. Help me!

시편 119:87.content: They had almost wiped me from the earth, but I didn’t forsake your precepts.

시편 119:88.content: Preserve my life according to your loving kindness, so I will obey the statutes of your mouth.

시편 119:89.content: Yahweh, your word is settled in heaven forever.

시편 119:90.content: Your faithfulness is to all generations. You have established the earth, and it remains.

시편 119:91.content: Your laws remain to this day, for all things serve you.

시편 119:92.content: Unless your law had been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.

시편 119:93.content: I will never forget your precepts, for with them, you have revived me.

시편 119:94.content: I am yours. Save me, for I have sought your precepts.

시편 119:95.content: The wicked have waited for me, to destroy me. I will consider your statutes.

시편 119:96.content: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but your commands are boundless.

시편 119:97.content: How I love your law! It is my meditation all day.

시편 119:98.content: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for your commandments are always with me.

시편 119:99.content: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for your testimonies are my meditation.

시편 119:100.content: I understand more than the aged, because I have kept your precepts.

시편 119:101.content: I have kept my feet from every evil way, that I might observe your word.

시편 119:102.content: I have not turned away from your ordinances, for you have taught me.

시편 119:103.content: How sweet are your promises to my taste, more than honey to my mouth!

시편 119:104.content: Through your precepts, I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.

시편 119:105.content: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.

시편 119:106.content: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, that I will obey your righteous ordinances.

시편 119:107.content: I am afflicted very much. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your word.

시편 119:108.content: Accept, I beg you, the willing offerings of my mouth. Yahweh, teach me your ordinances.

시편 119:109.content: My soul is continually in my hand, yet I won’t forget your law.

시편 119:110.content: The wicked have laid a snare for me, yet I haven’t gone astray from your precepts.

시편 119:111.content: I have taken your testimonies as a heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.

시편 119:112.content: I have set my heart to perform your statutes forever, even to the end.

시편 119:113.content: I hate double-minded men, but I love your law.

시편 119:114.content: You are my hiding place and my shield. I hope in your word.

시편 119:115.content: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.

시편 119:116.content: Uphold me according to your word, that I may live. Let me not be ashamed of my hope.

시편 119:117.content: Hold me up, and I will be safe, and will have respect for your statutes continually.

시편 119:118.content: You reject all those who stray from your statutes, for their deceit is in vain.

시편 119:119.content: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross. Therefore I love your testimonies.

시편 119:120.content: My flesh trembles for fear of you. I am afraid of your judgments.

시편 119:121.content: I have done what is just and righteous. Don’t leave me to my oppressors.

시편 119:122.content: Ensure your servant’s well-being. Don’t let the proud oppress me.

시편 119:123.content: My eyes fail looking for your salvation, for your righteous word.

시편 119:124.content: Deal with your servant according to your loving kindness. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:125.content: I am your servant. Give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies.

시편 119:126.content: It is time to act, Yahweh, for they break your law.

시편 119:127.content: Therefore I love your commandments more than gold, yes, more than pure gold.

시편 119:128.content: Therefore I consider all of your precepts to be right. I hate every false way.

시편 119:129.content: Your testimonies are wonderful, therefore my soul keeps them.

시편 119:130.content: The entrance of your words gives light. It gives understanding to the simple.

시편 119:131.content: I opened my mouth wide and panted, for I longed for your commandments.

시편 119:132.content: Turn to me, and have mercy on me, as you always do to those who love your name.

시편 119:133.content: Establish my footsteps in your word. Don’t let any iniquity have dominion over me.

시편 119:134.content: Redeem me from the oppression of man, so I will observe your precepts.

시편 119:135.content: Make your face shine on your servant. Teach me your statutes.

시편 119:136.content: Streams of tears run down my eyes, because they don’t observe your law.

시편 119:137.content: You are righteous, Yahweh. Your judgments are upright.

시편 119:138.content: You have commanded your statutes in righteousness. They are fully trustworthy.

시편 119:139.content: My zeal wears me out, because my enemies ignore your words.

시편 119:140.content: Your promises have been thoroughly tested, and your servant loves them.

시편 119:141.content: I am small and despised. I don’t forget your precepts.

시편 119:142.content: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness. Your law is truth.

시편 119:143.content: Trouble and anguish have taken hold of me. Your commandments are my delight.

시편 119:144.content: Your testimonies are righteous forever. Give me understanding, that I may live.

시편 119:145.content: I have called with my whole heart. Answer me, Yahweh! I will keep your statutes.

시편 119:146.content: I have called to you. Save me! I will obey your statutes.

시편 119:147.content: I rise before dawn and cry for help. I put my hope in your words.

시편 119:148.content: My eyes stay open through the night watches, that I might meditate on your word.

시편 119:149.content: Hear my voice according to your loving kindness. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your ordinances.

시편 119:150.content: They draw near who follow after wickedness. They are far from your law.

시편 119:151.content: You are near, Yahweh. All your commandments are truth.

시편 119:152.content: Of old I have known from your testimonies, that you have founded them forever.

시편 119:153.content: Consider my affliction, and deliver me, for I don’t forget your law.

시편 119:154.content: Plead my cause, and redeem me! Revive me according to your promise.

시편 119:155.content: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they don’t seek your statutes.

시편 119:156.content: Great are your tender mercies, Yahweh. Revive me according to your ordinances.

시편 119:157.content: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries. I haven’t swerved from your testimonies.

시편 119:158.content: I look at the faithless with loathing, because they don’t observe your word.

시편 119:159.content: Consider how I love your precepts. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your loving kindness.

시편 119:160.content: All of your words are truth. Every one of your righteous ordinances endures forever.

시편 119:161.content: Princes have persecuted me without a cause, but my heart stands in awe of your words.

시편 119:162.content: I rejoice at your word, as one who finds great plunder.

시편 119:163.content: I hate and abhor falsehood. I love your law.

시편 119:164.content: Seven times a day, I praise you, because of your righteous ordinances.

시편 119:165.content: Those who love your law have great peace. Nothing causes them to stumble.

시편 119:166.content: I have hoped for your salvation, Yahweh. I have done your commandments.

시편 119:167.content: My soul has observed your testimonies. I love them exceedingly.

시편 119:168.content: I have obeyed your precepts and your testimonies, for all my ways are before you.

시편 119:169.content: Let my cry come before you, Yahweh. Give me understanding according to your word.

시편 119:170.content: Let my supplication come before you. Deliver me according to your word.

시편 119:171.content: Let my lips utter praise, for you teach me your statutes.

시편 119:172.content: Let my tongue sing of your word, for all your commandments are righteousness.

시편 119:173.content: Let your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen your precepts.

시편 119:174.content: I have longed for your salvation, Yahweh. Your law is my delight.

시편 119:175.content: Let my soul live, that I may praise you. Let your ordinances help me.

시편 119:176.content: I have gone astray like a lost sheep. Seek your servant, for I don’t forget your commandments.
